data.title: CPKC certifies 14 new Site Ready locations across North America
data.description: Canadian Pacific Kansas City (TSX: CP) (NYSE: CP) (CPKC) disclosed the certification of 14 fresh Site Ready rail-served industrial development spots located strategically to expedite commercial growth in North America. The announcement was made in Calgary, AB, on March 12, 2026.

data.title: PBF Energy to Participate in Piper Sandler Energy Conference
data.description: Parsippany, New Jersey - On March 12, 2026, PBF Energy Inc. (NYSE:PBF) disclosed their participation in the upcoming Piper Sandler Energy Conference scheduled for March 16-17, 2026. The company's management team members will be part of this event. Access to any presentation materials shared during the conference will be provided on the Investor Relations platform.

data.title: Axcelis Announces CFO Transition
data.description: Today, Axcelis Technologies, Inc. disclosed that David Ryzhik, who serves as the Senior Vice President of Investor Relations and Corporate Strategy, will take on the role of Interim Chief Financial Officer. This appointment was made in Beverly, Massachusetts on March 12, 2026. Axcelis Technologies, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ACLS. David Ryzhik's new responsibilities come amidst changes in the company's financial leadership.

data.title: In HelloNation, Masonry Expert Alan Williams Explains Why Brick Facades Pull Away from Buildings
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia on March 12, 2026, an article by HelloNation highlighted Masonry Expert Alan Williams from A. W. Masonry & Restoration, discussing the reasons behind bulging or separating brick facades on buildings. The article delves into the risks associated with this issue.

data.title: ImmunoBrain to Present Topline Phase 1b Clinical Data for Immune Checkpoint Treatment in Alzheimer's Disease at AD/PD™ 2026
data.description: In New York on March 12, 2026, ImmunoBrain disclosed Phase 1b data for IBC-Ab002, a novel proprietary antibody aimed at inhibitory immune responses. As a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, ImmunoBrain focuses on developing immunotherapies for neurodegenerative disorders. The antibody showcased promising results in early trials, indicating potential efficacy in treating these conditions. This development marks a significant step forward in the company's efforts to address neurodegenerative diseases.

data.title: In HelloNation, Mortgage Loan Expert Matt Nieves Discusses Steps to Take Before Applying for a Mortgage
data.description: In a recent article on HelloNation, Matt Nieves of Contour Mortgage Patchogue Branch shared valuable advice for prospective homebuyers looking to apply for a mortgage. Nieves emphasized the importance of thorough preparation to enhance the strength of a mortgage application. By taking proactive steps before applying, buyers can improve their chances of securing favorable loan terms. Nieves' insights underscore the significance of careful planning in navigating the mortgage process.

data.title: Senate incorporates CBDC prohibition in housing bill, banning Fed from issuing digital currency.
data.description: The legislation on housing affordability includes a provision that prohibits the Federal Reserve from issuing a central bank digital currency. This decision highlights concerns surrounding the potential impacts of digital currencies on the economy. The move comes as digital currencies continue to gain popularity, with the market currently valuing at over $2 trillion globally. The inclusion of this provision reflects a growing trend among policymakers to carefully navigate the integration of digital currencies into the financial system.

data.title: Phillips 66 to speak at Piper Sandler 26th Annual Energy Conference
data.description: In Houston, Phillips 66 is set to engage in a fireside chat at the upcoming Piper Sandler 26th Annual Energy Conference scheduled for 1:30 p.m. ET on Tuesday, March 17, 2026.

data.title: Colgate-Palmolive Announces Quarterly Dividend Increase and Elects Christopher Boerner, Ph.D. to Board of Directors
data.description: In New York, the Board of Directors of Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) has decided to raise the quarterly common stock cash dividend to $0.53 per share, an increase from $0.52. This change will take effect in the second quarter of 2026. The Board announced that shareholders of record on April 20, 2026, will receive the second quarter dividend on May 15, 2026. The new annualized dividend rate is $2.12 per share, up from the previous $2.08. The company has a history of consistently paying dividends.

data.title: Curis to Report Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial and Operating Results and Host Conference Call and Webcast on March 19, 2026
data.description: In Lexington, Massachusetts on March 12, 2026, Curis, Inc. disclosed plans to disclose its financial results for the final quarter of 2025. The biotech firm, trading as CRIS on NASDAQ, specializes in advancing emavusertib (CA-4948), a medication that acts as an IRAK4 and FLT3 inhibitor. This orally administered, small molecule has garnered considerable attention for its potential therapeutic benefits.

data.title: Adobe Stock Drops On Q1 Earnings, CEO Transition
data.description: Adobe Inc, listed on NASDAQ as ADBE, released its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026 post-market close on Thursday. The company surpassed expectations with first-quarter revenue hitting $6.40 billion, above the projected $6.28 billion, while adjusted earnings reached $6.06 per share, surpassing estimates of $5.87 per share. Total revenue saw a 12% year-over-year increase, with total customer subscription revenue rising by 13% year-over-year to $6.17 billion. Adobe reported a total annualized recurring revenue (ARR) of $26.06 billion, with a focus on AI-first ARR. Adobe shares are responding positively to the earnings report. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.
Lennar Reports First Quarter 2026 Results

data.title: Rubrik Stock Pops After Strong Q4 Report: Details
data.description: Rubrik, Inc.'s shares (NYSE: RBRK) surged in after-hours trading on Thursday following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report, surpassing expectations on both top and bottom lines. The company reported earnings of four cents per share, exceeding the forecasted loss of 11 cents per share. Quarterly revenue stood at $377.68 million, beating the estimated $342.34 million and marking an increase from $258.1 million in the same quarter last year. Key highlights included a 34% year-over-year growth in Subscription Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR), which reached $1.46 billion. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com. Keep an eye on RBRK stock to track its movement.

data.title: iRhythm Holdings Appoints Jason Patten to its Board of Directors
data.description: On March 12, 2026, iRhythm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: IRTC), a prominent digital healthcare firm specializing in reliable solutions for disease detection, prediction, and prevention, welcomed Jason Patten to its Board of Directors. Mr. Patten's extensive experience in healthcare leadership will bolster iRhythm's dedication to innovation, operational prowess, and sustainable expansion.

data.title: Xos, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and full fiscal year 2025 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: Xos, Inc., a prominent electric truck manufacturer and fleet services provider trading on NASDAQ under the symbol XOS, disclosed plans to unveil its operational performance for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, on Thursday, March 26, 2026. The financial report will be made public post the closure of the U.S. financial markets.

data.title: Constellium Board Authorizes a New $300 million Share Repurchase Program Expiring in December 2028
data.description: In Paris on March 12, 2026, Constellium SE (NYSE: CSTM) announced a new share repurchase program of up to $300 million for its outstanding ordinary shares. This program was approved by the Board of Directors and will be active after the 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for May 21, 2026. It will remain in effect until December 31, 2028. The upcoming program supersedes the existing one, sanctioned by the Board of Directors in February 2024. The current program allows for share repurchases until the new program commences.
